  Looking at the current tiles array in the widget, it contains
  viewfinder-redesign--tiles--2026-04-26--19-31-22.png (the 500×500 from image-fey0f9
  we identified earlier). That's the one in the second position. The image-jm624q image
  isn't in the tiles prop yet but the getCanvasImageSources() auto-detect could pick it
  up.

  Two fixes needed:   1. The 19-31-22.png image is still in the tiles array (second position) — needs to
  be removed
   2. The auto-detect filter needs to also exclude image-jm624q's image (600×296) — but
   actually the aspect ratio filter should already catch that (600/296 =
    2.03, well outside the 0.85–1.15 range). The real issue is just the saved tiles
  array containing non-square images.  Let me also add an exclude prop so specific images can be blacklisted:● Read TilesWidget.jsx
